cel.position: foreground-right on the dark dolomite sand, larger, half-turned back to Hae-won, beckoning toward the black water
cel.pose: shoes dangling from her left hand, right hand beckoning — exactly two hands

hae-won.position: mid-ground-left, smaller, hanging back on the sand
hae-won.pose: both hands hugging her own elbows, hesitating — exactly two hands

spatial_rules: depth stagger, Cel nearer the water and larger, Hae-won set back
diagonal axis from Hae-won toward the glassy water past Cel
lighting: low warm boardwalk lamplight behind, the bay black and glassy ahead, night
